author: nflaig
content: I am pretty sure there are plenty of validators on the network that still vote down the gas limit from 60M, this shouldn't be an issue?

author: nflaig
content: but also I don't see why we need to configure this per pubkey, clients can remove this option if they want, we have a proposer config per pubkey, so for us it would require workarounds to remove it, if it's not configured per pubkey we just use the global default
